name: International Land Alliance Inc.
business: International Land Alliance Inc. is a residential land development company that acquires, subdivides, and improves properties in Baja California, Mexico and Southern California, selling residential lots and homes to homebuyers, retirees, investors, and commercial developers. Its portfolio includes projects such as Oasis Park Resort, Valle Divino, Plaza Bajamar Resort, Emerald Grove Estates, and Rancho Costa Verde.

exposures.sentence: We are a residential land development company with target properties located primarily in the Baja California Norte region of Mexico and Southern California.
Valle Divino is a self-contained solar 650-home site project in Ensenada, Baja California, with test vineyard at the property.

catalysts.event: Transfer of title on Valle Divino and Plaza Bajamar
catalysts.sentence: We are expecting the transfer of title on Valle Divino in Ensenada, Baja California and Plaza Bajamar in Ensenada, Baja California before the end of our second fiscal quarter of 2026

tamClaims.claim: Valle Divino represents an estimated $60 million in gross sales opportunity.
tamClaims.sentence: This represents an estimated $60 million in gross sales opportunity.
